ddls:
CREATE TABLE "battles" (
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle or event */,
  "battle_name" TEXT /* Name of the battle or event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the battle or event occurred */,
  "colony_state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the colony or state where the battle occurred */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the battle or event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the battle or event */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the battle or event (latitude, longitude) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the battle or event */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the battle or event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the battle or event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the battle or event */,
  "commander_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commander leading the battle */,
  "opposing_commander_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing commander */,
  "casualties" INTEGER /* Number of casualties in the battle */,
  "prisoners" INTEGER /* Number of prisoners taken */,
  "total_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the battle */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side of the conflict (e.g., British, American) */,
  "sources" TEXT /* Sources of information for the battle */,
  "importance" INTEGER /* Importance of the battle on a scale (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_colony_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("colony_state_id") REFERENCES colonies_states ("colony_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colonies_states" (
  "colony_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each colony or state */,
  "colony_state_name" TEXT /* Name of the colony or state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the colony or state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the colony or state */,
  "population_1770" INTEGER /* Population of the colony or state in 1770 */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the colony or state in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("colony_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, educator, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle or event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the battle or event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the battle or event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "related_event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related event */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., prelude, follow-up) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was established */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of information for the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_relationships_related_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_event_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_relationships_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle or event the media file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the media file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the media file (e.g., image, video, document) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the media file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the media file was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the media */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media file */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the media file (e.g., 'image', 'video', 'document') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_media_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_media_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id")
)
